author: DaxAlgo
name: DaxAlgo Terminal strategy plugin
description: A DaxAlgo Terminal strategy plugin: IStrategyPlugin registration, a backtestable IBacktestStrategy kernel with a worked EMA-cross demo, an offline test harness, a .daxplugin packaging script, and a CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md context pack for AI-assisted authoring. Pass --ui to scaffold a live strategy window (LiveSignalStrategyViewModelBase + MetroWindow) as well.

ui.description: Also scaffold a live strategy window (view-model on LiveSignalStrategyViewModelBase + a MetroWindow view + StrategyFactoryRegistration), referencing DaxAlgo.Sdk.Wpf. Omit for a headless / backtest-only plugin.
